title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Max Life Insurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Max Life Insurance
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Life Insurance! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Life Insurance:
Max Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
